pages.zh: 乌鸦嘴里叼着一块奶酪，站在树上。
pages.en: A crow sat in a tree with a piece of cheese in her beak.

pages.zh: 狐狸想要奶酪，就夸乌鸦唱歌好听。
pages.en: A fox wanted the cheese, so he praised the crow's singing.

pages.zh: 乌鸦一开口唱歌，奶酪就掉了下来。
pages.en: The moment the crow opened her beak to sing, the cheese fell.

pages.zh: 狐狸叼起奶酪跑了。原来不能轻信好听的话。
pages.en: The fox grabbed it and ran. Do not trust flattery too easily.

pages.zh: 放羊的男孩觉得无聊，大喊：「狼来了！」
pages.en: A bored shepherd boy shouted, "Wolf! Wolf!"

pages.zh: 村民们跑来帮忙，却发现根本没有狼。
pages.en: The villagers ran to help, but there was no wolf at all.

pages.zh: 男孩骗了好几次，大家就再也不相信他了。
pages.en: He tricked them again and again, so they stopped believing him.

pages.zh: 真的狼来时，没有人来帮忙。诚实最重要。
pages.en: When a real wolf came, nobody helped. Honesty matters most.
